author: PlayStation YouTube
text:
Wuthering Waves - Version 3.4 The Dream Not Dreamed Trailer | PS5 Games
https://www.playstation.com/games/wuthering-waves/

Wuthering Waves Version 3.4 is set to launch on June 8th (UTC+8). Join the thrill of the collaboration between Wuthering Waves and Cyberpunk: Edgerunners in this update!

The new 5-Star Resonators Lucy and Rebecca will debut, and you can snag the 5-Star Resonator Rebecca for free!

#ps5 #ps5games

author: PlayStation YouTube
text:
Gothic 1 Remake - Making Of #06: Combat System | PS5 Games
https://store.playstation.com/concept/10005976

"We felt that the original combat system was unique — something easy to pick up and learn, and something that gives you a lot of possibilities to build upon with progression. And we felt like these were the perfect parameters to build a new combat system."

Join Alkimia Interactive in the final (or is it?) chapter of the Making Of series dedicated to the combat system of Gothic 1 Remake! Discover the main challenges that the team faced while creating it and all the key insights from the development process.

Gothic 1 Remake releases on June 5 for PlayStation 5.

#ps5 #ps5games #gothic1remake 

Rated Mature

author: PlayStation YouTube

The Cat in the Hat: Rainy Day Mayhem - Announce Trailer | PS5 & PS4 Games
The Cat in the Hat has been working away, thinking of new ways to play 🤪. 
Get ready for your house to be filled with giggles, gasps, and glorious fun in The Cat in the Hat: Rainy Day Mayhem. Out this October! 

#ps5 #ps5games #ps4 #ps4games #DrSeuss #TheCatintheHat #RainyDayMayhem

author: PlayStation YouTube
text:
World of Tanks Modern Armor - Winged Devils | PS5 & PS4 Games
https://store.playstation.com/en-us/product/UP0680-PPSA02007_00-1160971101071150

It’s time to soar above the competition, Commander. Conquer the battlefield and earn incredible rewards in Winged Devils, the latest season of World of Tanks Modern Armor! 

Complete 100 Stages of challenges and treat yourself to a Season Pass to get your hands on the CS-67 Szakal, a brand-new medium tank whose Turbo Mode will let you fly across the battlefield at light speed. And if you want to really get ahead of other tankers, grab the Ultimate Season Pass and unlock the Wz. 64 Bzyg, a true Polish demon that can deliver up to 800 damage in a single shot.  

Plus, don’t miss one of the most thrilling events of the year—Banners of Valor is about to return! 

Spread your wings: the Winged Devils season begins on June 2. 

#ps5 #ps5games #ps4 #ps4games #wotma #wingeddevils

author: PlayStation YouTube
text:
Mina the Hollower - Launch Trailer | PS5 Games
https://store.playstation.com/concept/10010918

Take control of Mina, a renowned Hollower hurtled into a desperate mission to rescue a cursed island. Whip foes, burrow through the ground, and explore a pixel-perfect world in Mina the Hollower, a brand new action-adventure from the developers who brought you Shovel Knight.

#ps5 #ps5games #minathehollower

author: PlayStation YouTube
text:
Anima: Song from the Abyss - Release Window Trailer | PS5 Games
Anima: Song from the Abyss will launch in 2027.

Song from the Abyss is a new Action RPG set in the acclaimed universe of Anima: Beyond Fantasy. Players will control two distinct protagonists while exploring a world filled with secrets, danger, and unforgettable characters. Featuring fast-paced, fluid combat and a deep narrative-driven experience, the game invites players to uncover the mysteries hidden within the Abyss.

#ps5 #ps5games

author: PlayStation YouTube
text:
Edge of Memories - Intro Trailer | PS5 Games
https://store.playstation.com/concept/10014408

Let us introduce our game, Edge of Memories.

Our main heroine, Eline, meets Ysoris, a returning member from Edge of Eternity. Find out what brought these two together and how their unlikely partnership might change the fate of this doomed planet. 

Edge of Memories will be coming to PlayStation 5 soon.

#ps5 #ps5games #edgeofmemories

author: PlayStation YouTube
text:
Banban’s Garten: Distorting Clay - Announcement Trailer | PS5 & PS VR2 Games
Banban’s Garten: Distorting Clay is coming to Playstation!

WISHLIST NOW!
https://store.playstation.com/concept/10019853

Choose the way you want to play - Distorting Clay is playable in both FLAT and VR MODE, so you can immerse yourself with or without the VR headset.

Explore a mysterious world, interact with its characters and environment, and search for a way to escape the kindergarten.

Banban’s Garten: Distorting Clay is not a VR remake of the original series. Rather, it's its own special story that takes place inside of Banban's Kindergarten.

Banban’s Garten: Distorting Clay features the shapeshifting mechanic, allowing you to shift into familiar monsters that contain their own unique gameplay abilities and exclusive mechanics!

#ps5 #ps5games #psvr2 #psvr2games #banban
